benefits.description: Gained 8 lbs, though unintended. Also on HRT (Progesterone, Estrogen, Test)

side_effects.description: Gained 8 lbs over 6 months despite clean eating, high step count, and weight loss history

protocol_notes: Female, 55 years old. Started Ipamorelin 6 months ago (5 days on/2 days off). Also takes Ritalin for ADHD. Previously lost 140 lbs without GLP meds. Weight gain likely attributed to combination of water retention from GH secretagogue and possible Ritalin appetite effects. Also on HRT (Progesterone, Estrogen, Test).
